summary: Soundboard capture of an emotionally charged night highlighted by a searing Terrapin jam and a beloved Wharf Rat.
review: The reviewer is swept away by Jerry Garcia’s “seared” guitar and the kaleidoscopic vibe of the show, calling out the extended Terrapin jam and a classic Wharf Rat as unforgettable moments. While no specific recording issues are mentioned, the enthusiasm suggests the soundboard source is at least adequate for reliving the experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic review; strong praise for performance but only a moderate 3‑star rating and no concrete recording quality comments.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not discuss clarity or mix issues; assumes typical soundboard fidelity without notable problems.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is remembered for its powerful Terrapin jam (starting ~11:30 into the song) and the enduring appeal of Wharf Rat, indicating a high‑energy, emotionally resonant performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as “searing” and cutting straight through the listener; his guitar work is highlighted as a highlight of the night.
